notes: Professional documentation and evidence work — calm, procedural, office/site. Australian settings, metric readings. No courtroom, no dramatic or distressing scenes. Focus on the technician's hands, tablet, camera and logs, not faces. No on-image text, no real brand names/logos.

images.context: Course hero image for 'Introduction to Water Damage Litigation Support'
images.prompt: A professional restoration technician in plain workwear and nitrile gloves methodically photographing a dried-out water-damaged room with a tablet held mid-frame, documenting a scope of works. A tripod-mounted camera records the drying progress in the background, and a clipboard with drying logs rests on a folding table. Calm, orderly, well-lit Australian residential interior, daylight through the windows, evidence being gathered carefully. Over-shoulder framing, realistic photography.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing/dramatic mould, no courtroom, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no legal drama, no imperial units

images.context: Modules on data gathering and psychrometric records — recording moisture evidence
images.prompt: Close-up of a technician's gloved hands taking a reading from a pin-type moisture meter pressed against a skirting board, while the other hand logs the figure on a tablet displaying a simple moisture and relative-humidity chart. A thermo-hygrometer and a neat drying log sit on the floor beside them. Bright, clinical, precise, Australian site, metric readings implied. Hands-on-task framing, realistic photography.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing/dramatic mould, no courtroom, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no imperial units

images.context: Modules on report creation and evidence chain of custody — assembling the documentation file
images.prompt: An orderly desk in a bright Australian office where gloved hands arrange a documentation pack: printed before-and-after site photographs, an annotated equipment placement map, a sealed labelled sample bag, and a laptop showing a tidy drying-log spreadsheet. Professional, calm, methodical evidence-management scene. Mid-distance top-down framing, realistic photography.
